summary: Phase 1-4 Testing Complete: RBAC, Security, Volunteers, QR Polish. All 26 backend tests pass. UI tests confirm mode toggle, QR code at 200px, and 48px pickup code.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (5/min per IP) works but affects test runs - recommend increasing limit for testing environments or IP allowlist
minor.note: Functioning as designed per security requirements

issues: Chart console warnings about width/height -1 during load - non-blocking rendering issue

phase1_rbac_verified.login_returns_permissions_and_role_title: PASS - Login response includes permissions[] array and role_title
phase1_rbac_verified.role_templates_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/admin/roles/templates returns 9+ templates (member, kids_volunteer, church_admin, etc.)
phase1_rbac_verified.get_user_permissions: PASS - GET /api/admin/members/{user_id}/permissions returns full permission details
phase1_rbac_verified.update_permissions_array: PASS - PUT /api/admin/members/{user_id}/permissions replaces entire permissions array
phase1_rbac_verified.users_by_role: PASS - GET /api/admin/roles/users returns users grouped by role_title
phase1_rbac_verified.aivy_church_admin: PASS - Aivy logs in as church_admin with 33+ permissions including admin.kids.manage
phase1_rbac_verified.member_403_on_admin: PASS - Member users get 403 when accessing admin endpoints
phase1_rbac_verified.mode_toggle_admin_dashboard: PASS - [Admin][Member] toggle visible in top bar on admin dashboard

phase2_security_verified.rate_limiting: PASS - 5 requests per minute per IP, 6th returns 429
phase2_security_verified.security_headers: PASS - X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, Strict-Transport-Security
phase2_security_verified.health_detailed: PASS - GET /api/health/detailed returns per-service status with database check
phase2_security_verified.session_management: PASS - 24hr token lifetime, max 5 concurrent sessions per user

phase2_idempotency_verified.checkin_idempotency: PASS - Same X-Idempotency-Key returns cached pickup_code on duplicate requests

phase3_volunteers_verified.get_teams: PASS - GET /api/admin/volunteers returns teams with members
phase3_volunteers_verified.assign_volunteer: PASS - POST /api/admin/volunteers/assign assigns user to team
phase3_volunteers_verified.aivy_kids_team: PASS - Aivy's volunteer assignments include Kids Check-In Team (seeded at startup)

phase4_qr_polish_verified.qr_size_200px: PASS - QR code renders at 200px x 200px on Kids Check-in card
phase4_qr_polish_verified.pickup_code_48px: PASS - Pickup code displays at 48px monospace font-weight:700
phase4_qr_polish_verified.giving_nudge: PASS - Check-in response includes nudge payload with give_amounts [10, 25, 50, 100]
phase4_qr_polish_verified.nudge_buttons: PASS - Giving nudge appears after check-in with [$10][$25][$50][$100][Not today] buttons

regression_verified.accounts_login: PASS - Platform admin, church admin (Aivy), member (Vince) all login successfully

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC implementation follows Active Directory-inspired permission registry pattern
Rate limiting uses in-memory counters - appropriate for single-instance deployment, would need Redis for multi-instance
Idempotency uses MongoDB TTL collection (24hr expiry) for check-in deduplication
PortalLayout correctly redirects non-member users to dashboard (line 69-72)
Mode toggle in PortalLayout only shows for users with admin.* permissions (line 178)
QR code value format: SOLOMON_PICKUP_{child_id}_{pickup_code}_{date} - well-structured for scanning

success_rate.frontend: 100% (mode toggle, QR code, pickup code all verified)

seed_data_creation: Used existing Baby Hinojosa child for Kids Check-in testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1-4 features verified: RBAC with permissions[] in login, 10 role templates, security headers, rate limiting (5/min), health endpoints, volunteer teams with Aivy in Kids Check-In Team, QR at 200px, pickup code at 48px monospace, giving nudge with amounts [10,25,50,100]. Rate limiting may affect rapid test execution - use session fixtures.

mocked_apis_list: Payment/Stripe flow on Give page - donations simulated
SMS notifications - logged to console instead of sending
